steps.title: Find each total height
steps.content:
A data set total equals its mean times its count:
$$
80(40)=3{,}200
$$
$$
45(65)=2{,}925
$$

steps.title: Average the combined set
steps.content: Data set C contains all $125$ buildings, so divide the combined total by $125$: $$ \frac{3{,}200+2{,}925}{125}=\frac{6{,}125}{125}=49 $$ The answer is 49.
